activation.requires: 6 months cumulative uptime (all uptime added across restarts)

four-pillar-framework.pillar: Belt system recognition, time-in-rank, org verification
Non-discrimination, right to refuse, prejudice risk
Proportionality, Castle Doctrine, Stand Your Ground, de-escalation

us-government-controls.control: Castle Doctrine / Stand Your Ground / Duty to Retreat (jurisdiction-dependent)
ASQ CSSBB 3-year recertification (18 RUs or re-exam)

prophecy-controls.control: Module will NOT load before 6-month threshold
All load attempts logged with timestamp
Operates under US law constraints only
No offensive capability — defensive assessment only
Professional, non-accusatory language in all evaluations
Closure decisions: closed or follow_up_required only

belt-tiers.tier: World Taekwondo/Kukkiwon, USA Judo/USJF/IJF, IBJJF BJJ, WKF/JKA Karate
Tang Soo Do, Hapkido, American Kenpo, independent federations
MCMAP, MACP, SOCOM variants — tagged as combatives, not civilian belts
